name: Cccs  Of Lss - South Dakota
description_short: LSS of South Dakota is a nonprofit providing free and low-cost financial counseling, behavioral health services, and comprehensive family support across the state.
description_long:
LSS of South Dakota is a faith-inspired nonprofit organization serving individuals, families, and communities throughout South Dakota. Founded on the mission that 'all people in South Dakota will be healthy, safe and accepted,' LSS operates a diverse continuum of services designed to address the root causes of financial and personal instability rather than treating symptoms alone.

The organization offers financial counseling and education as part of their Mental & Financial Wellness division, providing guidance for achieving financial stability. This service sits within a broader portfolio that includes behavioral health services, family stabilization, refugee support, older adult services, youth empowerment, and foster care services. Their financial counseling is explicitly marketed as part of helping individuals navigate challenges, set goals, and connect to resources.

What distinguishes LSS is their whole-person, integrated approach to consumer financial wellness. Rather than operating as a standalone credit counseling agency, financial guidance is embedded within a comprehensive social services model that addresses mental health, housing, employment, family dynamics, and community integration. This allows clients to access coordinated support across multiple life domains. The organization is transparent about its nonprofit status and values-based mission, operating with professional staff and volunteer networks.

LSS appears to be a legitimate free-help resource for South Dakotans, though the website provides limited specific details about financial counseling methodology, counselor certifications (NFCC certification status unclear from available content), pricing structure, or detailed service descriptions. The organization's focus on holistic community support is a strength, but consumers seeking specialized credit repair or intensive debt management may need to verify whether LSS's financial counseling addresses their specific needs.
pros: Free or low-cost financial counseling integrated with comprehensive mental health and family services
Nonprofit organization with transparent mission and values-based approach to care
Serves all demographics regardless of faith, race, or economic status across entire South Dakota
Offers family stabilization services to help clients navigate challenges and set goals
Part of larger continuum including behavioral health, reducing need for external referrals
Active volunteer program allows flexible community engagement and support
Recent matching gift campaign demonstrates organizational growth and community support
cons: Website provides minimal detail about financial counseling specifics, credentials, or methodology
No clear information about NFCC certification or counselor qualifications for financial services
Limited geographic accessibility may be challenging for rural South Dakota residents
Service integration with mental health and family services may not suit consumers seeking standalone credit counseling
No pricing transparency or information about sliding scale fees on primary website
best_for: South Dakota residents needing integrated financial and mental health support
Families experiencing multiple challenges (financial instability, behavioral health needs, housing insecurity)
Low-income individuals qualifying for nonprofit services in South Dakota
Refugees and immigrants seeking financial literacy alongside language and employment support
diagnosis: LSS of South Dakota is best for consumers in South Dakota who need financial counseling as part of a broader support system addressing mental health, family stability, or social integration. The primary caveat is that detailed information about their financial counseling approach, counselor certifications, and whether they are NFCC-affiliated is not available on their website, so prospective clients should contact them directly to verify service specifics.
services: Financial Counseling & Education for achieving financial stability
Behavioral Health Services (flexible and affordable mental health counseling)
Family Stabilization Services to navigate challenges and connect to resources
Refugee & Immigration Support including workforce training
Older Adult Services to maintain independence and age at home
Youth Empowerment and Independent Living Services
Pregnancy Counseling with parenting and adoption resources
Multi-Cultural Center with interpreting and community engagement
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 33 3Rd St Se Ste 202, Cornerstones Career Learning Center, Huron, SD 57350
